# Generated candidate hypotheses (target nominations) — loose 100%-live sweep, all 3 conditions

**Framing:** each row is a referee-**supported** A→(Th1/Th2)→C candidate QUESTION generated by the LBD
proposer running 100% live in Claude Science over the full loose gene universe — a **target nomination,
NOT a finding**. Each would need NAB2-style vetting (replication, confounders, cis-check) before it is
more than a lead. `ac_lit` = direct gene–disease papers (LOW = under-explored); `effect` = downstream DE
genes (data strength). NAB2 is the anchor (near-novel AND strong — the novelty×effect standout).

**Timepoint-specificity:** 39 unique gene×disease candidates; 34 are timepoint-SPECIFIC (1 condition), 5 SHARED across ≥2 (more robust).
